name: @paideia/module-infrastructure
description: Paideia infrastructure module - env, S3, email, health checks, platform detection

scripts.migrate:fresh: PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun --bun payload --disable-transpile migrate:fresh --force-accept-warning && bun scripts/clean-s3.ts
scripts.generate:payload: PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun --bun payload --disable-transpile generate:types && PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun --bun payload --disable-transpile generate:db-schema
